free_text: Elastic and inelastic neutron cross sections for
Fast neutron tandem Van de Graaff
Pulsed deuteron beam on deuterium gas cell at
Time of flight with 3.74 and 5.76-meter flight
path. Detectors use constant fraction discriminators
to minimize timing walk. Wide dynamic range n-gamma
pulse-shape discriminators used. Data normalized to
NE-218 scintillators used to detect scattered
neutrons. Both massively shielded with lithium carbon-
(2.54-cm by 3.30-cm) used to monitor source neutrons.
obtain absolute cross sections and to check detector

fluence(due to sample-monitor size difference), finite
source and sample, multiple scattering, anisotropy of
source, finite angular resolution, finite detector
size, presence of multiple elements in scattering
